runtime_buffers.name: k
runtime_buffers.desc: Key tensor [kv_heads, seq_len, head_dim], strided layout

runtime_buffers.name: v
runtime_buffers.desc: Value tensor [kv_heads, seq_len, head_dim], strided layout

params.name: kv_stride_tokens
params.desc: Stride in tokens for KV layout

strategies.name: head
strategies.notes: Parallelize across heads; each thread handles one or more heads.

constraints.notes: Flash attention uses SIMD paths when available. This variant is full / bidirectional and applies no causal mask.

impl.c_declaration: void attention_forward_full_head_major_gqa_flash_strided(const float *q, const float *k, const float *v, float *output, int num_heads, int num_kv_heads, int num_tokens, int head_dim, int aligned_head_dim, int kv_stride_tokens);

notes: Full / bidirectional multi-head attention with GQA support. Intended for encoder-style prefill where every token attends to the full sequence.
